channel.title: Dad Joke of the Day
channel.description: A fresh dad joke every day. Get the app at dadjokes.vip

item.title: What is a woodpecker’s favorite kind of joke?
item.description:
What is a woodpecker’s favorite kind of joke?
A knock-knock.

item.title: How many skunks does it take to smell up a neighborhood?
item.description:
How many skunks does it take to smell up a neighborhood?
Just a phew.

item.title: First octopus: What do you like least about being an octopus?
item.description:
First octopus: What do you like least about being an octopus?
Second octopus: Washing my hands before dinner.

item.title: Why do giraffes have such small appetites?
item.description:
Why do giraffes have such small appetites?
Because with them, a little goes a long way.

item.title: Why is a snake so smart?
item.description:
Why is a snake so smart?
Because you can’t pull its leg.

item.title: Why do dragons sleep during the day?
item.description:
Why do dragons sleep during the day?
So they can hunt knights.

item.title: What is the difference between a cat and a match?
item.description:
What is the difference between a cat and a match?
A cat lights on its feet, and a match lights on its head.

item.title: What has more letters than the alphabet?
item.description:
What has more letters than the alphabet?
The post office!

item.title: What kind of money do marsupials use?
item.description:
What kind of money do marsupials use?
Pocket change.

item.title: What did the mother buffalo say to her boy as he was leaving?
item.description:
What did the mother buffalo say to her boy as he was leaving?
“Bison.”
